methodology: Active=updated<30d; Aging=updated 30-89d; Stale=not updated 30d+; Zombie=not updated 90d+
health_note: 38% of open issues haven't been touched in 30+ days; 142 (15%) dormant 90+ days. High closure rate (409/30d) but ~75% are bot-driven inactive sweeps, not genuine resolutions. Two unresolved disk-exhaustion bugs (13+ and 6+ days old).

closure_health.note: ~75% of closures are bot-driven 'inactive' sweeps. True resolution velocity is lower than closure count implies.
